---
title: "Stories from the frontier"
subtitle: "Science written by the people doing it — and those who love to write about it."
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, date, author, categories, description, reading-time]
  feed: true
---

<div class="sc-page-hero">
  <p class="sc-eyebrow">The blog</p>
</div>
